overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character moves from a covered sidewalk along a wet street, crosses an intersection with yellow markings, and enters a dark underpass beneath the buildings. The environment features cyberpunk architecture with reflective wet pavement, neon signage in orange and teal, and scattered pedestrians.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk, approaching a group of pedestrians ahead

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: smooth concrete building facade with teal accent lighting and reflective wet surface
dark armored vehicle parked along the curb with red taillights
large structural pillar with yellow-black hazard stripes at the base
glowing orange and blue neon lights from distant buildings reflecting on wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered sidewalk at night, with a modern building wall on the right and a parked military truck visible on the left. The wet concrete reflects the neon lights from the surrounding cyberpunk cityscape. A group of pedestrians approaches from ahead, walking in the opposite direction.

events.description: steps off the sidewalk onto the street crosswalk with yellow zebra markings

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet asphalt street at the intersection, moving toward the opposite sidewalk

entered.detail: wet asphalt with yellow zebra crossing stripes and green painted text markings
tall pole with traffic signals showing green walk signal

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wet street at an intersection, moving from the covered sidewalk onto the open asphalt crosswalk. Yellow zebra stripes and green painted markings are visible on the road surface. The traffic light pole stands at the center of the intersection as the character moves toward the opposite side.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street corner with commercial buildings

events.description: turns left at the intersection corner to walk along the adjacent street

agents.ego_description: walking along the street sidewalk after turning the corner, passing by buildings with distinctive red ventilation panels

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in purple shirt and white cap walking toward the underpass entrance

entered.detail: multi-story building with distinctive red rectangular ventilation panels and teal structural elements
tall street lamp with bright illumination
illuminated vending machine with red and blue glowing lights

segments.scene_description: After turning left at the intersection, the character walks along a city street lined with buildings featuring red ventilation panels. A pedestrian in a purple shirt walks ahead toward a dark underpass entrance. Street lights and a glowing vending machine are visible along the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark concrete underpass with debris and graffiti

events.description: enters a dark concrete underpass or alleyway beneath the building structure
lighting shifts from bright neon street lights to dim, shadowy underpass illumination

agents.ego_description: walking into the dark underpass, passing debris and graffiti on the walls, moving toward distant lights

entered.detail: dark tunnel-like passage beneath the building with overhead concrete beams and distant light at the end
scattered trash, cardboard, and discarded items accumulated along the wall
large red cylindrical barrel near the underpass entrance
large industrial pipes and ventilation ducts running along the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark, enclosed concrete underpass beneath the city buildings. The environment shifts from bright neon-lit streets to a shadowy corridor with debris piles, a red barrel, and industrial overhead pipes. The passage leads toward a distant light at the far end of the tunnel.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit futuristic city that transitions from a bright, open street into a dark industrial underpass. It begins along a covered sidewalk where wet concrete reflects the surrounding city lights, moving past a parked military truck and oncoming pedestrians. As the camera leaves the shelter of the building, it crosses a wet intersection marked with yellow zebra stripes and green paint, passing a central traffic light pole. The scene then shifts as the character turns left, following a pedestrian in a purple shirt past red ventilation panels and a glowing vending machine. Finally, the environment transforms from the vibrant street into a shadowy, enclosed concrete underpass filled with debris, red barrels, and overhead pipes that lead toward a distant light.
